data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Progress percentage display', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions a provider dashboard showing an 85% completion rate, it does not provide specific details on how this percentage is calculated or displayed through an API. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming the progress percentage display functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate progress percentage API
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that the API returns the correct progress percentage for the checklist.
